product: ForEachBatch for Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines is available (Public…
tagline: You can now process streams in Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines as a series of micro batches in Python, using a ForEachBatch sink.
what_it_does: You can now process streams in Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines as a series of micro batches in Python, using a ForEachBatch sink. The ForEachBatch sink is available in public preview. The ForEachBatch sink processes a stream as a series of micro batches.
why_it_matters: Complex or stateful logic can lead to serialization errors or performance bottlenecks.
key_takeaway: You can now process streams in Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines as a series of micro batches in Python, using a ForEachBatch sink.
